suite.description: Colonial luxury with private living room and colonial balcony.

about.title: History and Colonial Elegance
about.description: Located in the colonial heart of Cuenca, Hotel Majestic II combines 19th-century historical architecture with modern amenities. Our privileged location allows you to explore the cobblestone streets, colonial churches and rich culture of the 'Athens of Ecuador'.
about.group: We are part of Hospitality & Hotels Group, a hotel chain committed to service excellence and authenticity of the Ecuadorian experience.

experiences.title: Discover Cuenca
experiences.subtitle: Explore the cultural and tourist treasures surrounding our hotel

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse into the beauty of our hotel and the city

cta.title: Ready to experience Majestic?
cta.description: Book now and experience the colonial magic of Cuenca in the heart of the city. Our team is ready to assist you.
